name: illuminate
description: Dense source in. Self-contained interactive HTML out. Three-stage arc: salience-gated signal extraction (per-source thesis test; noise cut before the pyramid, not disclosed lazily), Barbara Minto Pyramid construction with MECE adversarial audit, and a polished editorial HTML artifact (shadcn/ui + Swiss typography) with evidence drawer and interactive ASCII. Editorial restraint; parallax opt-in.
author: marcomorettim

examples.output: Single-file HTML: SCQA hero, GT typewriter, 4 MECE Key Lines, salience-gated evidence drawer, editorial ASCII, confidence meters
Chapter-by-chapter synthesis with cross-chapter SYNTHESIS signals, counter-intuitive INSIGHT callouts, issue tree
Codebase provenance chain: L0→L4 translation layers as interactive evolution arc

capabilities.stage_1: Multi-source ingestion, 6-tag signal stratification (SOURCE/INSIGHT/METRIC/PRINCIPLE/SYNTHESIS/GAP), 3-angle extraction, per-source salience gate (KEEP/CONTEXT/CUT against the source thesis; mandatory cut-list), provenance audit
capabilities.stage_2: Hub detection, MECE issue tree, Barbara Minto Pyramid, 3-skeptic adversarial audit
capabilities.stage_3: Portable self-contained editorial HTML (shadcn/ui vocabulary — Tabs, Accordion, Tooltip, Badge, filterable evidence Sheet), Swiss typography, per-KL diagram↔code toggle with syntax-highlighted mechanism snippets, interactive ASCII/SVG illustrations, Web Animations motion, keyboard navigation; parallax opt-in via rich tier

evidence_contract.ASSERT: only claims that trace to a specific S-NNN signal block entry
evidence_contract.HEDGE: claims where evidence is partial, contested, or version-fragile
evidence_contract.EXCLUDE: claims where the trace cannot be established
